conversationMetadata.title: Debugging Flask app object registration - Claude

messages.content: repertoire app/models/entities/user.py test DEBUG - process_file model retourne: methods={'init': {'is_static': False, 'params': [], 'returns': {'success': [], 'fail': []}}, 'create_user': {'is_static': False, 'params': [{'name': 'name: str', 'required': True}, {'name': 'email: str', 'required': True}, {'name': 'status: str', 'required': False, 'default': '"active"'}, {'name': 'description: str', 'required': False, 'default': 'None'}], 'returns': {'success': [{'value': 'self.create_object(data)', 'comment': ''}], 'fail': []}}, 'get_user_by_email': {'is_static': False, 'params': [{'name': 'email: str', 'required': True}], 'returns': {'success': [{'value': 'self.read_object(filters)', 'comment': ''}], 'fail': []}}, 'activate_user': {'is_static': False, 'params': [{'name': 'user_id: int', 'required': True}], 'returns': {'success': [{'value': 'self.update_object(user_id, {"status": "active"})', 'comment': ''}], 'fail': []}}, 'deactivate_user': {'is_static': False, 'params': [{'name': 'user_id: int', 'required': True}], 'returns': {'success': [{'value': 'self.update_object(user_id, {"status": "inactive"})', 'comment': ''}], 'fail': []}}, 'associate_user_with_role': {'is_static': False, 'params': [{'name': 'user_id: int', 'required': True}, {'name': 'role_id: int', 'required': True}], 'returns': {'success': [{'value': 'self.add_relation(user_id, role_id, relation_type_id=4)', 'comment': 'Relation type "role"'}], 'fail': []}}}, parent_class=Entity, attributes=[], description=, datas=[] [ERREUR] Une erreur est survenue : 'model' [INFO] L'application Flask a été initialisée avec succès ! * Debug mode: off WARNING: This is a development server. Do not use it in a production deployment. Use a production WSGI server instead. * Running on http://127.0.0.1:5000 Press CTRL+C to quit

donne moi le ficier complet
